title: calamagrostis autumnalis subsp. autumnalis
intro: Calamagrostis autumnalis subsp. autumnalis, also known as golden feather grass, is a perennial grass species belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Calamagrostis autumnalis subsp. autumnalis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions.
